        embedAssets
      • embedAssets(dir: static string): untyped
        preloadAssets
      • preloadAssets()

This service provider implements a static assets bundler, allowing you to embed files (like images, CSS, JS) directly into your Supranim application binary.

It provides a simple API to add assets at compile-time and retrieve them at runtime. Basically, this service provider is a convenient way to manage static resources without needing to read from the filesystem at runtime.

The embedAssets macro can be used to embed all files from a specified directory, and the service will automatically determine if they are plain text or binary based on a simple heuristic.

This is particularly useful for serving static content in web applications or bundling resources for CLI tools.

Imports

../core/services, ../core/paths

Types

OnInitSingletonCallback`gensym0`gensym10 = proc (
    instance`gensym0`gensym10: ptr Assets) {....gcsafe.}
StaticAssetsError = object of CatchableError

Consts

AssetsImportStmt = r"AssetsImportStmt"

Procs

proc addAsset(sta: ptr Assets; key: string; data: seq[uint8]) {.
    ...raises: [StaticAssetsError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add an asset to the StaticBundle (used at compile-time) 
proc addTextAsset(sta: ptr Assets; key: string; data: string) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add plain-text asset 
proc get(sta: ptr Assets; key: string): lent seq[uint8] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, StaticAssetsError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Retrieve an embedded asset by its key (relative path) 
proc getAssetsInstance(onceCb`gensym0`gensym10: OnInitSingletonCallback`gensym0`gensym10 = nil;
                       initShared`gensym0`gensym10: static bool = true): ptr Assets
Retrieve the singleton instance of the service 
proc getAssetString(sta: ptr Assets; key: string): string {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, StaticAssetsError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Fast path for text assets; fallback to byte->string copy 
proc hasAsset(sta: ptr Assets; key: string): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Checks if an embedded asset exists for the given key 
proc hasAssetString(sta: ptr Assets; key: string): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Checks if a text asset exists for the given key 
proc isPlainText(data: openArray[uint8]; sampleSize = 8192): bool {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Fast heuristic (not perfect) 
proc staticAssets(): ptr Assets {.inline, ...raises: [Exception],
                                  tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Returns the Singleton instance of the Assets service

Macros

macro embedAssets(dir: static string): untyped

Embed all files from the specified directory into the application binary.

Use supra bundle.assets <dir> <output> command to generate the embedded assets file.

macro preloadAssets()
Preloads assets at runtime (if needed). This can be used to trigger any lazy loading logic.
